posts.cookedHtml:
Support

The Time Tracking Column

6 min read Feature     Wondering how much time you spend on each task? You now have the ability to track it with the Time Tracking Column! ⏰ Note: This feature is only available for the Pro...

I have seen requests to add the ability to allow multiple users to track the same time on a task - for example, yesterday we had departmental training that was mandatory for everyone. We are unable to track individual time during that training time because there is only one “training” task on the project. Is there an update or work around for this?
